description: The Rollin' 90s Neighborhood Crips are a set of the larger Crips gang alliance, based on the west side of South Los Angeles, California. Formed in the late 1970s or early 1980s, they are primarily African-American and engage in drug trafficking and murder. The gang has expanded to other U.S. cities and Canada, with a notable presence in Nashville and Montreal.

country_links.evidence_quote: Around 2016–17, a new set of the Rollin's 90 Crips formed in the west side area of Montreal , Canada.
country_links.context: The Rollin' 90s Crips formed a new set in Montreal, Canada, engaging in assassinations, home invasions, drug and gun trafficking, and credit card fraud.
